name: Miniature Cheesecakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 355°F (177°C).
2. Line a 16-cupcake baking pan with paper liners.
3. Place one vanilla wafer into the bottom of each cup.
4. In a mixing bowl, combine the cream cheese, sugar, lemon juice, lemon peel, vanilla, and egg whites.
5. Fill each muffin cup about 2/3 full with the cream cheese mixture.
6. Bake for 20 minutes.
7. Allow to cool completely.
8. Top each cheesecake with a dollop of strawberry pie filling.
